response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript proficiency, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — aligning closely with the role’s AI-native engineering requirements. His operational ownership, open-source leadership, and cross-functional collaboration history further support his fit. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of Python mastery and on-call incident response, but his full-stack depth and agentic system experience outweigh these.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven track record in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational and open-source leadership with CI/CD, monitoring, and dev-ops ownership
concerns: Resume emphasizes TypeScript/Node.js more than Python — depth in Python not explicitly detailed
No explicit mention of on-call incident response or operational SLA ownership
German language skill is basic, which may limit stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based teams
